'''âj-zh-b-dh''' ('''kajazhbedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:logicise|logicise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:logicise|logicise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-zh-b-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhbedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhbedhoko|thijazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jijazhbedhoko|jijazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shijazhbedhoko|shijazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kijazhbedhoko|kijazhbedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazhbedhoko|thuthujazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jujujazhbedhoko|jujujazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shushujazhbedhoko|shushujazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kukujazhbedhoko|kukujazhbedhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujazhbedhoko|thujazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jujazhbedhoko|jujazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shujazhbedhoko|shujazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kujazhbedhoko|kujazhbedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazhbedhoko|thojazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jojazhbedhoko|jojazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shojazhbedhoko|shojazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kojazhbedhoko|kojazhbedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazhbedhoko|thojazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jojazhbedhoko|jojazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shojazhbedhoko|shojazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kojazhbedhoko|kojazhbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjazhbedhoko|thĂŠjazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjazhbedhoko|jĂŠjazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjazhbedhoko|shĂŠjazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjazhbedhoko|kĂŠjazhbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazhbedhoko|thathajazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jajajazhbedhoko|jajajazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shashajazhbedhoko|shashajazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kakajazhbedhoko|kakajazhbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazhbedhoko|thajazhbedhoko]] || [[word:jajazhbedhoko|jajazhbedhoko]] || [[word:shajazhbedhoko|shajazhbedhoko]] || [[word:kajazhbedhoko|kajazhbedhoko]]

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajazhbedhithi|shajazhbedhithi]] || [[word:shajazhbedhiji|shajazhbedhiji]] || [[word:shajazhbedhishi|shajazhbedhishi]] || [[word:shajazhbedhiki|shajazhbedhiki]]
